item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
impressive
more than one?
again
looks good
indeed
real talk
i have been in hiding
dang that's a beast
still like it every now and then
yes
just some C&C humor
i have to agree w Harold.. BFG is a great book
when you need to roll 5 blunts
maryland and DC don't know how to party?
mmm hmm
wait what
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: I spent 2 months growing this copper sulfate crystal
item.description: Started growing these in high school chemistry class and never stopped. Recipe: https://crystalverse.com/best-way-to-grow-copper-sulfate-crystals/ Heisenberg would be proud. Then again, perhaps not because they're mildly toxic and not edible. At least Hank might wanna collect them

item.dc:creator: cissychandler

item.title: I do a good job
item.description: My partner does a good job of making feel appreciated but I recently found out my hip is broken and I can’t stand or walk for a month to recover. My wife told me recently that she didn’t realize just how much I did around the house, until she had to do it all. Please no comments about how she’s not a good partner because she is, just nice to know I’m actually doing as much as I am trying
item.dc:creator: kidfromOKwiththetuckfromMB

item.dc:creator: bluecamera

item.title: Screaming into the void seems like a good option today
item.description: Before you ask, I work full time, I have good friends. I have tons of hobbies (which they say will help you meet other single people). Glassblowing, D&D, baking, video games, board games. I hang out with friends when they're not busy being a couple or parents (so basically I see them once a month, if that). I've tried the dating apps but people just swipe endlessly and don't even respond when you reach out first. And yes, when I message, I will pick something from their profile and start a conversation from there. Screaming into the void seems like a good option today. EDIT: There are so many comments, it's hard to respond to everyone. I'm not ignoring you; just a little overwhelmed, but it's warming to know that I am not alone (you know what I mean!). I hope everyone finds what they are looking for!
item.dc:creator: MGellyGelly

item.title: "Fuck Russia, Slava Ukraini" -Canadians
item.description:
Why is some dude in Ontario posting a picture of a plane, saying Fuck Russia? Because FUCK EM. Current POV from hotel across the street.
Russia attempted a landing in Toronto in Feb 2022, well into the Ukraine war. Tower control bait+switched them, gave them clearance to land, but now refuses to give clearance for refueling OR takeoff. Plane has been grounded, stuck in that corner for over 2 years. Long enough that it can be seen from Google Maps satellite view. Not only that, there is talk about transferring the asset to Ukraine, since the gate fees of $0.77c/minute is pushing $1million. https://toronto.citynews.ca/2024/01/12/antonov-airplane-toronto-pearson-international-airport/ Fuck Russia, Slava Ukraini
item.dc:creator: Daxton

item.dc:creator: GreeenTreeWizard

item.title: Still waiting 8 hours for a bed after being admitted with a serious infection
item.description: Edit: Thank you so much my fellow Imjurians for such super kind messages of support!! Had to do this myself because of fear that my husband would get sick and we both would be down. I finally got in the door of the ED at 10 pm and spent the night in the hallway. Received IV antibiotics and more blood taken for labs. No food is available so no breakfast until husband comes. Am actually leaving against doctors orders. Staff is pleading for me to stay but what for? They have data and I’ve been treated. I peed all over myself, no regular meds ordered, am in pain, am exhausted beyond comprehension and need to take care of myself. Staff here are great but what can be done? And COVID patients are everywhere in every possible place to put a bed. I am vaxxed and boosted but need to flee. I’m sick and afraid. And I live in a very well off area. But I am convinced that the state of medical care here in the U.S. has collapsed. I came down with a serious cellulitis infection in my arm due to lymphedema from breast cancer treatment many years ago and was told to hurry to the emergency department. Fever, chill, body aches, and feeling really sick. Got here at noon, checked in pronto but was suggested I sit outside and wait because a sea oh humanity has engulfed this place; many with COVID. Saw the doctor, went back to lay down on the bench, was called in for blood tests, back to my bench. Had IV antibiotic infusions, back on bench. Pizza for dinner on my bench because no food available. It’s 8:30 pm and still on a bench outside. This situation is just awful and the ambulances and more people arrive. I can’t go home *against doctor’s advice* or I will be billed by the hospital. This makes me so sad…and I remain so sick. At 68 yrs old I’m spent. Hospital is in Murrieta California. I’m trapped and can’t get in. There is no “Mellon” for me.
item.dc:creator: FosterMomForKittens
